basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech in Civil (Structural) or Mechanical or Materials Science and Engineering with First Class or equivalent CGPA
qualification.details: ME/M.Tech in Civil (Structural) or Mechanical or Materials Science and Engineering with First Class or equivalent CGPA.

salary_details.details: ₹ 37,000 per month for the first two years and ₹40,000 or 42,000 after completion of 2 years.

selection_process: Preliminary shortlisting based on resume Online Interview through Google Meet
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an ME/M.Tech degree in Civil (Structural) or Mechanical or Materials Science and Engineering with a First Class or equivalent CGPA to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month for the first two years, which will be revised to Rs. 40,000 or Rs. 42,000 per month after the completion of two years.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial shortlisting of candidates based on their resumes, followed by an online interview conducted through Google Meet.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Research Fellow recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this BITS Pilani recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with necessary documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Research Fellow position is offered on a contractual basis, providing an opportunity for candidates to gain experience in research.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Fellow position in this recruitment drive by BITS Pilani.

faq.question: Q9. Which city is the job located in?
faq.answer: The job is located in Hyderabad, Telangana.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
